docs.title: 🤖 AI Customer Support Agent
docs.text:
This project is an intelligent AI-powered customer support system built using:

  • FastAPI (Backend)
  • LangChain + Groq (LLM)
  • Streamlit (Frontend)

docs.title: Flow
docs.text:
1. Build system prompt
  2. Add conversation history
  3. Send to LLM
  4. Parse JSON response
  5. Execute tool if needed
  6. Loop until final answer

docs.title: Key Concept
docs.text: The agent works in a loop: - Think - Act (tool) - Observe - Repeat

docs.title: POST /chat
docs.text:
Request: { "session_id": 123, "query": "Where is my order?" }

Response: { "response": "Your order is out for delivery" }

docs.title: 🏗️ Architecture
docs.text: Frontend (Streamlit) ↓ FastAPI Backend ↓ Agent Logic ↓ LLM (Groq) ↓ Tools + RAG + Memory

docs.title: Additional Tool calls
docs.text:
• Email sending tool | Both are for
  • Message sending tool | order & delivery popups
  • Invoice generation (PDF) tool | If the person wants invoice for their order send in chat

docs.title: DB update functions
docs.text:
1. 📦 Order modification | Change details in db based on user query
  2. change address

  3. reschedule delivery

  4. 🎟️ Ticket creation (with priority levels)

  5. When you are raising ticket look back at the conversation and choose a priority level (1-5)

docs.title: System Design
docs.text:
1. Create user & admin login
  2. Use JWT auth tokens
